title: Add dark mode toggle to workspace UI
description: Implement a toggle switch in the header that allows users to switch between light and dark themes. Store the preference in localStorage and apply the appropriate CSS classes.

title: Improve API error handling with structured error responses
description: Modify the server-entry.js to return consistent JSON error objects with error code, message, and details instead of plain text or HTML errors. This improves client-side error handling.

title: Optimize database queries in the user service
description: Review the user service in services/user.js and add missing indexes to frequently queried fields. Also, implement pagination for large result sets.
